programme.title: beIN STORY
programme.desc: beIN STORY est un rendez-vous documentaire, de 70 à 90 minutes, revenant sur un moment clé de l'histoire du sport ou sur une légende des stades. L'émission est présentée par le ou la journaliste et l'un(e) des consultant(e)s du sport concerné. Evènement imprévu, athlète au destin tragique ou moment crucial qui a changé pour toujours une discipline sportive, beIN STORY présente de grands documentai

programme.title: Live MNF: Sunderland v Burnley
programme.desc: Monday Night Football comes from the Stadium of Light as two of this season's promoted teams clash. It was Burnley who took the spoils earlier this season, beating Sunderland 2-0.

programme.title: Transfer 360: Gareth Barry
programme.desc: Find out the inside story on Premier League record-appearance-holder Gareth Barry's failed move from Aston Villa to Liverpool and how Manchester City swooped in instead.

programme.title: Transfer 360: Michael Carrick
programme.desc: Tasked with replacing the legendary Roy Keane at Manchester United: how did Michael Carrick handle his move from Tottenham Hotspur? Hear from him as well as former managers and teammates.

programme.title: MNF: Sunderland v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Monday Night Football comes from the Stadium of Light as two of this season's promoted teams clash. It was Burnley who took the spoils earlier this season, beating Sunderland 2-0. (02.02)

programme.title: PL Stories: Deadline Day Drama
programme.desc: As the January window reaches its conclusion, explore the evolution of the Premier League's transfer market, from the competition's early years to the high-stakes spectacle it is today.

programme.title: PL Retro:Liverpool v Man City 2018
programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic clash. Here, Liverpool host Manchester City back in January 2018 at Anfield in a twisting, turning thriller. Would City maintain their unbeaten record?

programme.title: PL Greatest Games: Chelsea/Arsenal
programme.desc: A chance to remember a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Arsene Wenger's Arsenal meet Chelsea in a five-goal thriller back in 1997.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, London rivals West Ham and Spurs meet at Upton Park back in 2007 in a seven-goal thriller that saw some late, late drama.

programme.desc: A chance to relive a classic match from the Premier League. Here, Manchester United take on Chelsea back in September 2000 in a thrilling game that saw six goals.

programme.desc: London rivals Chelsea and West Ham battle it out at Stamford Bridge. The Irons secured a huge three points last Saturday, seeing off Sunderland to close the gap to safety. (31.01)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Surprise title contenders Villa compete on Super Sunday at home to Brentford. The Villans laid down a marker at St James' Park last time, responding to defeat here against Everton. (01.02)

programme.title: Live: ATP/WTA Tennis
programme.desc: Britain's Emma Raducanu opens her Cluj campaign against Greet Minnen, while Beatriz Haddad Maia faces Dayana Yastremska. Jelena Ostapenko and Daria Kasatkina both compete.

programme.title: Live: ATP/WTA Tennis
programme.desc: Opening-round action from the Open Occitanie in Montpellier as Frenchman Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard and Arthur Géa go toe to toe, while Roberto Bautista Agut plays Christopher O'Connell.

programme.title: ATP Final: Brisbane
programme.desc: The United States' Brandon Nakashima stands between Daniil Medvedev and Brisbane redemption as the 2019 finalist takes another swipe at glory in the 2026 final. (11.01)

programme.title: WTA Final: Brisbane
programme.desc: Defending champion Aryna Sabalenka enters a third straight Brisbane final as the world number one meets Marta Kostyuk, who defeated fourth seed Jessica Pegula to get here. (11.01)

programme.title: ATP Final: Madrid
programme.desc: Britain's Jack Draper steps on court for the Madrid Open final aiming to lift his second Masters 1000 crown, as the 23-year-old faces 14th seed Casper Ruud for the first time. (04.05)

programme.title: WTA Final: Miami
programme.desc: In Miami, the women's final get underway as top seed Aryna Sabalenka meets with home favourite Jessica Pegula in a repeat of last year's US Open decider. (29.03)

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: Meeting for the first time in a final at tour level, the Williams sisters Venus and Serena went toe to toe in an emotionally charged contest for the Miami Open title.

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: In their first ever match in what would become a trophy-laden rivalry, Roger Federer - the then world number one - encountered Rafael Nadal in the third round of the 2004 Miami Open.

programme.title: ATP Final: Rome
programme.desc: World number one Jannik Sinner takes on soon-to-be world number two Carlos Alcaraz in a blockbuster Italian Open final. Between them, the pair have won the last five majors. (18.05)

programme.title: WTA Final: Madrid
programme.desc: In a repeat of the 2023 US Open final, two-time Madrid champion Aryna Sabalenka eyes another marquee title against Coco Gauff, who won their only prior clay-court meeting. (03.05)

programme.title: ATP Final: Toronto
programme.desc: Ben Shelton features in his first ATP Masters final as the 22-year-old eyes world number six status against Karen Khachanov, who ends a seven-year wait to compete on this stage. (07.08)

programme.title: WTA Final: Rome
programme.desc: A women's singles champion is crowned at the Italian Open, as home favourite and world number five Jasmine Paolini faces the American Coco Gauff. (17.05)

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: In a five-hour, five-set Rome Open epic, an 18-year-old Rafael Nadal lit up the Foro Italico in his back-and-forth contest with Argentina's Guillermo Coria.

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Emma Raducanu arrives in Cluj as the British top seed - on the hunt for a new coach after parting ways with Francis Roig - opens her campaign against Belgium's Greet Minnen. (02.02)

programme.title: WTA Final: Cincinnati
